title: Magical Mechanisms
description: Magical Mechanisms is a mod pack with several magic mods, Create and several related mods, and exploration / structure / weapon / cooking / animal / utility mods to complete the experience.
body:
Magical Mechanisms is a mod pack aimed at combining magic mods with the Create mod (and several Create additions) and many exploration / structure / weapon / animal / cooking mods to add variety to the world and round out the experience.

Some of the magic mods:
* Bewitchment
* Besmirchment
* Arcanus: Legacy
* Mythical Metals
* Mythic Mounts
* Whisperwoods

Some of the exploration / structure mods:
* Inmis
* Scout
* Better End
* Better Nether
* Promenade
* JourneyMap
* Yung's Better mods
* Additional Structures
* Immersive Structures
* Oh the biomes you will go

Some of the food / cooking mods:
* Farmers Delight
* Expanded Delight
* Cultural Delight
* Cooking for Blockheads
* Farming for Blockheads
* Vinery - Let's do Wine
* Meadow - Let's do Cheese
* Drink Beer Unofficial: Clockwerk Edition
